message:
style(btree,pager): cargo fmt — rewrap test-module let bindings to single line

Pure formatting cleanup on two files. No behavior changes; both are
inside `mod tests` blocks.

crates/fsqlite-btree/src/cursor.rs
  Three test-module let bindings where the RHS of a `let ptr_array_after
  = ...` / `assert_eq!(...)` had been manually split across four lines
  are collapsed back into the single-line form that rustfmt prefers.

crates/fsqlite-pager/src/pager.rs
  Two test-module changes: a `.iter().filter(...).count()` chain that
  had been hand-wrapped is collapsed to one line, and a
  `u32::from_be_bytes([...])` literal is also collapsed.

`cargo fmt --check` was clean after these changes; no other file needed
reformatting.
